channel.title: Spectrum on Cryspen
channel.description: Recent content in Spectrum on Cryspen

item.title: EIC Transition: Spectrum
item.description:
We are excited to have been awarded a Transition Grant from the European Innovation Council to build a specification and verification toolkit that developers can use to build and deploy provably-secure software. The project is called Spectrum and it builds on our hax open-source framework.

In the coming months, we will describe how we and our customers use the Spectrum tools on a daily basis to design and implement security-critical systems. If you would like to know how Spectrum can help you, get in touch.
